content.en:
Ye Tian absorbed and refined these extreme golden lights, and his will was constantly improving.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's will improved a lot, but he refined and exhausted these Extreme Dao Golden Lights, and still did not let his will rise to the level of Extreme Dao Will.

"It is too difficult to condense the will of the Extreme Dao in the realm of a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, is there really a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm to do it?"

Ye Tian asked himself suspiciously.

The answer is definitely yes.

If he was really a descendant of the Lord of the Ancients, even if the Lord of the Ancients didn't have enough Extreme Treasures like the Blue Zero Liquid, he would exchange them with other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, or spend a long time looking for them, so he didn't need to worry.

However, he wasn't, and it was normal for the Lord of the Ancients to not be too attentive.

And if those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers really cultivated a genius with a very demonic talent at all costs, they could really let the other party condense the Extreme Dao Will at the level of the Extreme Realm Perfection Controller.

"I'm on my own!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He then continued on his way to try to climb the 3,000th step.

This time, it was more difficult for him, it would take some time for each step to walk, and the extreme strength on his body was about to be fully displayed.

When all the power of Ye Tianji's Dao exploded, he still did not climb to the third thousandth step.

"The 2886th step!"

Ye Tian looked at the three thousand steps in front of him, it didn't seem to be very far away, but he had already tried his best and couldn't take a step forward.

"Continue to comprehend some extreme powers, but there should be hope for hitting the 3,000th step in one breath!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he couldn't stay inside the Gate of the Extreme Dao all the time, he could only stay for 10,000 Eternal Years, and once he didn't come out of the Ten Thousand Eternal Years, he would inevitably be ostracized by the Gate of the Extreme Dao.

Otherwise, some Extreme Dao creatures regard this place as a place of cultivation, which is not good.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to step into the three thousand steps, he could only wait for the second chance to enter the Gate of the Extreme Dao.

"Forget it, let's get out!"

Ye Tian went out from the Gate of the Extreme Dao and returned to the outside world.

......

"Little one, why have you been in the Gate of the Extreme Dao for so long?"

The Great Sun King Monkey appeared and asked.

"Senior of the Great Sun King Monkey, I just wanted to cultivate at the Gate of the Extreme Dao, but I found that it didn't work. Ye Tian explained.

"Hahaha, although the cultivation there is better than the outside world, it's just like that. And it can only stay for 10,000 eternal years at most, so it doesn't make much sense. "The Great Sun King Monkey Road.

Ye Tian didn't stay here for long, and left quickly.

After all, this is not a safe place, and if any of the Extreme Dao creatures are unhappy with it, they can completely attack him.

But when he left here, he was safe in the Extreme Dao Source Sea, and other Extreme Dao creatures would not make a move against him.

After all, other Extreme Dao creatures didn't dare to violate the rules here, and as for what punishment would be for violating the rules, Ye Tian didn't know.

"I captured the Void Sparrow with the Dragon Crow Replica Body, but instead of killing the Void Sparrow, I handed over the Void Sparrow to my own copy body, brought it back to the Daoless Tower, and killed the Void Sparrow in the Daoless Tower, so I didn't trigger the rules of the Extreme Dao Source Sea. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he won't try, in case he really touches some rules and his identity is exposed, it won't be good.

For him, the value of the Extreme Dao Source Sea is still very high, and he still wants to enter the Gate of the Extreme Dao again.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to comprehend other extreme paths, and at the same time, he was also practicing the rudiments of the endless extreme paths.

This time, he used a large amount of Extreme Dao Golden Light to greatly improve his will, so the Endless Extreme Dao Prototype should be able to continue to progress, at least there is no big problem in fusing a few more changes.

Time passed slowly, and tens of millions of eternal years passed.

"The changes in the prototype of the Endless Extreme Dao have been fused to nineteen, and there has been a lot of progress. Moreover, I have also learned a lot of extreme paths, and there should be no problem when I step into the 3,000th step of the gate of the extreme path. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

He was going to go to the Gate of the Extreme Path one more time.

On this day, Ye Tian came to the Gate of the Extreme Dao.

But this time, he didn't see the Great Sun King Monkey, and he didn't know where to run.

Ye Tian didn't care about the gazes of other Extreme Dao creatures, and directly entered the Extreme Dao Gate again.

"Why did that little guy enter the Gate of the Extreme Path again?"

"I don't know, our Extreme Dao creatures can only enter three times in total, and he enters twice in a row, isn't it a waste of opportunity?"

"Leave him alone, he's just a fool!"

These Extreme Dao creatures didn't think too much about it, after all, Ye Tian had nothing to do with them.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered the Gate of the Extreme Dao again, stepped into the Golden Road of the Extreme Dao, and stepped on it step by step.

This time, he stepped into the thousandth step and did not gain much benefit, and it was obvious that the Gate of the Extreme Path could not give him a second reward.

Soon, he had stepped the two thousandth steps again, and he was not rewarded.

As time passed, Ye Tian approached the three thousandth steps again.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

One step after another was crossed by Ye Tian, and finally the three thousand steps were also stepped on at Ye Tian's feet.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

Airplanes!

The golden light of the Extreme Dao descended and was absorbed by Ye Tian.

Immediately, he began to refine the Extreme Golden Light here, and after spending a period of time, the Extreme Golden Light was completely refined and exhausted by him.

However, he can only go so far, and there is no way to continue to improve.

"There should be four thousand steps on the Extreme Golden Road, if you walk through them all, you can directly cross the Gate of the Extreme Road and enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, those extreme creatures in the outside world were confused.

How can there be another Extreme Dao creature that has obtained the Extreme Golden Light?

"It can't be the little Void Sparrow guy from before, right?"

"No, although the bloodline of that Void Sparrow is not simple, it is just a cub, the years of birth are definitely not long, how can he break through the thousandth step of the Extreme Golden Path? Moreover, these three Extreme Golden Light, you don't think that he did it, right, then he has to go to the third thousandth step? This is impossible!"

"It doesn't matter if he can't be, when he comes out, I will directly grab him and interrogate him. "

"Yes, just interrogate, is it possible that he can still resist?"

"If it's really him, maybe that Void Sparrow has found the loophole of the Extreme Dao Gate, if we also know about the loophole, wouldn't we be able to climb to the higher steps of the Extreme Dao Golden Road and obtain a large amount of Extreme Dao Golden Light?"

All of a sudden, these extreme creatures were ready to move.

Not long after, Ye Tian came out of the Gate of the Extreme Dao.
